active_callers: domain handler export OPL control plane registration
declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb the registry shell, but cannot absorb MAG's domain id, stage semantics, or safe action metadata.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Express as declarative grant pack metadata; OPL generated registry surfaces consume refs without MAG owning generic runtime registration.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: MAG must expose its domain id, stage pack refs, and safe action refs so OPL can discover the grant agent without owning grant truth.

declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Generic lifecycle can be absorbed; grant lifecycle stage semantics and checkpoint interpretation remain MAG authority.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Move generic checkpoint/lifecycle shell to generated OPL surfaces; keep MAG stage ids and checkpoint semantics in the declarative grant pack.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: Grant stages such as critique, revision, freeze, and package readiness carry domain meaning that OPL cannot infer generically.

declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb source transport and freshness shell; it cannot own funding call interpretation or grant task lock.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Represent funding-call/task-lock requirements as declarative pack inputs; OPL owns source transport, freshness, and repair shell.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: Funding-call interpretation, applicant profile fit, and grant task lock are domain authority decisions.

reclassified_as_testing_evidence_gaps.required_evidence: accepted and rejected real workspace memory receipts plus body-free retrieval/writeback projection
real workspace package handoff plus cleanup, restore, and retention receipt bundle
external OPL generated/replacement caller consumes MAG pack input without regressing direct MAG surfaces
OPL-hosted attempt evidence reconciles with MAG owner receipt, typed blocker, or no-regression refs
continuous reconciliation snapshot observes repeated receipt refs without creating a second truth source
long-run live soak includes OPL provider receipt, MAG owner receipt or typed blocker, and no-forbidden-write proof
accepted and rejected real workspace memory receipts plus body-free retrieval/writeback projection
real workspace package handoff plus cleanup, restore, and retention receipt bundle
external OPL generated/replacement caller consumes MAG pack input without regressing direct MAG surfaces
OPL-hosted attempt evidence reconciles with MAG owner receipt, typed blocker, or no-regression refs
continuous reconciliation snapshot observes repeated receipt refs without creating a second truth source
long-run live soak includes OPL provider receipt, MAG owner receipt or typed blocker, and no-forbidden-write proof

generated_surface_handoff.bridge_policy: MAG handwritten product/status/domain_handler/projection wrappers are migration bridges, not long-term MAG owner surfaces.

current_mag_path_status.proof_policy: listed current_mag_paths must exist in the MAG repo; stale paths may only be moved to history/provenance or refreshed as source refs.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: fundability must be backed by a grant-review or fundability stage artifact; schema completeness or OPL provider completion cannot set this verdict
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Fundability is a grant-review judgment over call fit and applicant evidence.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Fundability is a grant-review judgment over call fit and applicant evidence.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: quality must be backed by an AI-authored critique, quality closure dossier, or reviewer artifact; numeric scorecards cannot independently declare ready
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Authoring quality requires MAG-owned AI critique and issue closure semantics.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Authoring quality requires MAG-owned AI critique and issue closure semantics.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: export readiness must trace to MAG package/export stage authority; artifact presence or generic lifecycle completion cannot declare submission-ready
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Submission/export readiness is a grant package gate, not package existence.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Submission/export readiness is a grant package gate, not package existence.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: package mutation requires MAG owner receipt tied to the grant package stage; OPL artifact lifecycle may only carry refs and receipts
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Grant package mutation and release require MAG package authority.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Grant package mutation and release require MAG package authority.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: memory accept/reject must be a grant-strategy decision over domain memory meaning; OPL memory transport can only carry body-free refs and writeback proposals
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Grant strategy memory body and accept/reject decisions are MAG authority.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Grant strategy memory body and accept/reject decisions are MAG authority.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: owner receipts can sign only MAG domain receipts, typed blockers, safe action refs, or no-regression evidence; they cannot create grant verdicts from runtime state
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Only MAG can sign domain owner receipts or no-regression evidence.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Only MAG can sign domain owner receipts or no-regression evidence.

minimal_authority_functions.ai_first_guard: grant helpers may validate funder, route, blocker, and action metadata only; they cannot bypass grant-stage AI review or owner receipt authority
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Grant-native helpers encode funder, route, and blocker semantics.
minimal_authority_functions.cannot_generate_reason: Grant-native helpers encode funder, route, and blocker semantics.

active_callers: domain handler export OPL control plane registration
declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb the registry shell, but cannot absorb MAG's domain id, stage semantics, or safe action metadata.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Express as declarative grant pack metadata; OPL generated registry surfaces consume refs without MAG owning generic runtime registration.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: MAG must expose its domain id, stage pack refs, and safe action refs so OPL can discover the grant agent without owning grant truth.

declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Generic lifecycle can be absorbed; grant lifecycle stage semantics and checkpoint interpretation remain MAG authority.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Move generic checkpoint/lifecycle shell to generated OPL surfaces; keep MAG stage ids and checkpoint semantics in the declarative grant pack.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: Grant stages such as critique, revision, freeze, and package readiness carry domain meaning that OPL cannot infer generically.

declarative_pack_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb source transport and freshness shell; it cannot own funding call interpretation or grant task lock.
declarative_pack_surfaces.migration_action: Represent funding-call/task-lock requirements as declarative pack inputs; OPL owns source transport, freshness, and repair shell.
declarative_pack_surfaces.retention_reason: Funding-call interpretation, applicant profile fit, and grant task lock are domain authority decisions.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL generic lifecycle cannot determine grant-stage readiness, critique meaning, or package-stage transition validity.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: Expose refs to OPL display/routing; do not migrate authority.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Grant lifecycle stage is domain truth and gates owner receipts.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can show readiness refs, but cannot make fundability, quality, or export verdicts.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: Expose verdict refs to OPL readiness shell; do not migrate verdict authority.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Fundability, authoring quality, and export readiness are grant-review judgments.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL artifact lifecycle can manage refs and retention, but cannot approve a grant package.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: Let OPL own artifact/package lifecycle shell; keep submission-ready and export gate authority in MAG.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Submission-ready is a domain export gate, not generic package existence.

active_callers: OPL generic transition runner expected input
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can execute a generic runner, but cannot own the grant transition table's meaning.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: OPL should run the generic transition matrix; MAG keeps oracle fixtures and grant guard semantics.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: The oracle encodes grant-specific stage guards and quality/export blockers.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL ledger can store refs, but cannot sign or reinterpret MAG owner receipt.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: OPL should own receipt transport/ledger projection; MAG retains receipt authority and no-regression meaning.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Owner receipt is the domain authorization boundary for grant mutations.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can transport refs and writeback proposals, but cannot own memory body or accept/reject decisions.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.migration_action: OPL should own body-free memory locator/writeback transport; MAG keeps memory body, accept/reject decision, and receipt writer.
mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Grant strategy memory body and accept/reject policy are domain knowledge authority.

refs_only_adapter_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Generic lifecycle transport is absorbable; domain mutation approval and package authority cannot move out of MAG.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.migration_action: Keep only owner receipt/blocker refs for OPL lifecycle shell; do not expose MAG package body, memory body, or lifecycle state.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.retention_reason: Cleanup, restore, and retention events that touch grant artifacts need MAG owner receipt and package authority refs.

refs_only_adapter_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb display/SLO/repair shell; it cannot create grant verdicts or mutate receipt authority from observability data.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.migration_action: Expose refs, counts, blockers, and verdict refs only; OPL owns display, SLO, repair projection, and workbench shell.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.retention_reason: MAG observability projections carry grant owner receipt refs, typed blockers, and verdict refs needed by the OPL read model.

refs_only_adapter_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: The generic shell can be absorbed, but MAG-specific dispatch validation, receipt refs, and safe action semantics remain domain owned.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.migration_action: Keep guarded domain dispatch and domain_handler refs; OPL generated surfaces own product/operator/action-routing shell.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.retention_reason: OPL needs a MAG-owned domain_handler adapter to read receipts and invoke guarded domain actions without owning grant truth.

refs_only_adapter_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL can absorb artifact lifecycle transport and gallery shell; it cannot declare MAG package readiness or export verdict.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.migration_action: Expose package refs, gap refs, and verdict refs only; OPL owns lifecycle shell, restore/retention ledger, and package refs index.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.retention_reason: Submission-ready export is a grant-domain authority surface, not a generic artifact lifecycle success flag.

active_callers: product user-loop and status refs projections
executor default metadata for OPL adapter refs
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: The workbench and scheduler can be absorbed; MAG's domain action metadata and typed blocker meaning cannot.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.migration_action: Expose action metadata and typed blockers only; OPL owns app workbench, generic scheduler, provider daemon, and repair command projection.
refs_only_adapter_surfaces.retention_reason: MAG still needs refs-only user-loop/status projections for direct skill and OPL domain_handler callers.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Default runtime ownership must not stay in MAG. Explicit non-default executor selection remains a separate adapter receipt path, not this closed default path.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep only compact history index refs for closed default paths; explicit non-default executor use goes through OPL executor adapter refs.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: No closed default path remains as active source residue or compatibility surface; history refs are body-free provenance only.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: The legacy local attempt-record store itself should not be absorbed as MAG-owned code; OPL should provide the generic stage record surface while MAG keeps safe action refs and grant next-action meaning.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Old local runtime history and attempt-record code has been deleted; OPL owns session records, typed attention queue, wakeup scheduler, and stage-attempt records.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Active MAG source retains refs-only session/runtime locator projections under refs-only adapter classifications; local runtime history implementation and tests are not retained.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: This is retired compatibility glue, not an OPL primitive to absorb.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep only tombstone/provenance; do not add compatibility aliases or re-export facades.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: The old domain_runtime facade file is absent from active source.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Testing layout is repo-local hygiene, not a generic OPL runtime primitive.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep focused replacement tests; do not classify them as legacy aggregate callers.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: The aggregate compatibility test entry is gone; focused tests protect current machine-readable contracts.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Flat aliases are retired local CLI surface, not a reusable OPL primitive.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep grouped product/workspace/pass/package commands classified as direct domain handler targets; do not keep a legacy flat-alias compatibility surface.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Machine command fields may stay stable in grouped handlers, but retired flat aliases have no active caller and must not be reintroduced as compatibility commands.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL owns production scheduler/daemon; MAG only exposes grant route and authority refs.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: OPL owns provider scheduler/daemon; MAG keeps any runtime_control projection under refs-only adapter classifications without local run/resume diagnostics.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Runtime-control metadata remains covered by refs-only adapter entries, not by this legacy scheduler/daemon tombstone.

route_stage_handoff_boundary.route_semantics: MAG routes express grant-domain next-owner or route-back recommendations; OPL transports them as refs into stage attempts.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Grant lifecycle stage is domain truth and gates owner receipts.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Fundability, authoring quality, and export readiness are grant-review judgments.

mag_owned_grant_authority_surfaces.retention_reason: Submission-ready is a domain export gate, not generic package existence.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Old local runtime history and attempt-record code has been deleted; OPL owns session records, typed attention queue, wakeup scheduler, and stage-attempt records.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Active MAG source retains refs-only session/runtime locator projections under refs-only adapter classifications; local runtime history implementation and tests are not retained.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: This is retired compatibility glue, not an OPL primitive to absorb.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep only tombstone/provenance; do not add compatibility aliases or re-export facades.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: The old domain_runtime facade file is absent from active source.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Testing layout is repo-local hygiene, not a generic OPL runtime primitive.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep focused replacement tests; do not classify them as legacy aggregate callers.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: The aggregate compatibility test entry is gone; focused tests protect current machine-readable contracts.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: Flat aliases are retired local CLI surface, not a reusable OPL primitive.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: Keep grouped product/workspace/pass/package commands classified as direct domain handler targets; do not keep a legacy flat-alias compatibility surface.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Machine command fields may stay stable in grouped handlers, but retired flat aliases have no active caller and must not be reintroduced as compatibility commands.

retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.cannot_absorb_reason: OPL owns production scheduler/daemon; MAG only exposes grant route and authority refs.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.migration_action: OPL owns provider scheduler/daemon; MAG keeps any runtime_control projection under refs-only adapter classifications without local run/resume diagnostics.
retire_or_tombstone_surfaces.retention_reason: Runtime-control metadata remains covered by refs-only adapter entries, not by this legacy scheduler/daemon tombstone.
